description: UNION ALL of two SELECT statements preserves all rows including duplicates
name: union_all
query_sql:
-- @name ListAllNamesWithDuplicates
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, name FROM users UNION ALL SELECT id, name FROM products
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', bio TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
CREATE TABLE products (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, price INTEGER NOT NULL, category TEXT NOT NULL)
